name: unhighlight_objects
short_description: Unhighlight objects that are currently highlighted
full_help:
unhighlight_objects

Description: 
Unhighlight objects that are currently highlighted

Syntax: 
unhighlight_objects  [-color_index <arg>] [-rgb <args>] [-color <arg>]
                     [-leaf_cells] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<objects>]

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-color_index]  Color index
  [-rgb]          RGB color index list
  [-color]        Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and 
                  orange
  [-leaf_cells]   Leaf cells
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<objects>]     Objects to unhighlight

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and orange
Suspend message limits during command execution
